Container.Name: MosaicTV
Container.Overview: Turn your media library into scheduled 24/7 live TV channels with bumpers, filler, watermark overlays, and M3U/XMLTV output for Plex/Jellyfin/Emby or any IPTV player. Works on any CPU; optional NVIDIA GPU hardware transcoding.
Container.Description: Turn your media library into scheduled 24/7 live TV channels. Encodes on the CPU by default. For NVIDIA hardware transcoding: install the Nvidia-Driver plugin, add --runtime=nvidia to Extra Parameters, and set the NVIDIA GPUs variable to 'all' (see the docs).

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Your media library (mounted read-only). Add libraries in the app pointing at subfolders like /media/TV Shows.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for schedules and the TV guide.

Config.Name: NVIDIA GPUs
Config.Description: OPTIONAL — NVIDIA hardware transcoding. Set to 'all' (or a GPU UUID from `nvidia-smi -L`) AND add --runtime=nvidia to Extra Parameters. Requires the Nvidia-Driver plugin. Leave empty for CPU encoding.

Config.Name: NVIDIA Capabilities
Config.Description: Set to 'all' when using an NVIDIA GPU; leave empty otherwise.

Config.Name: Internal Port
Config.Description: Port the app listens on inside the container.
